projects.name: User-Generated Review Analysis System
projects.description: Developed a system to analyze and classify user reviews using NLP and Machine Learning. Leveraged Python libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, and NLTK for data preprocessing and model building. Implemented text preprocessing techniques like tokenization, stopword removal, and TF-IDF vectorization. Built a sentiment analysis model to classify reviews as positive or negative, and extracted key insights through keyword and phrase analysis.

projects.name: E-commerce Data Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed e-commerce sales data to identify trends in revenue, customer behavior, and product performance. Cleaned and transformed data using Pandas and SQL; created visualizations in Power BI. Designed an interactive Power BI dashboard with dynamic filters for category, region, and time periods. Provided actionable insights to improve sales strategy and inventory planning.
